mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO APT_COMPLEX ( APT_CMPLEX_NO, APT_CMPLEX_NM, BJD_CD, SIDO_NM, SIGUNGU_NM, EMD_NM, LAT_VAL, LON_VAL, UNIT_CNT, BLD_YR, CNSCO_NM, HEAT_TY, PKG_CNT, MAX_FLOOR, DONG_CNT, DOROJUSO, CC_CNT ) VALUES ( #{item.aptCmplexNo}, #{item.aptCmplexNm}, #{item.bjdCd}, #{item.sidoNm}, #{item.sigunguNm}, #{item.emdNm}, #{item.latVal}, #{item.lonVal}, #{item.unitCnt}, #{item.bldYr}, #{item.cnscoNm}, #{item.heatTy}, #{item.pkgCnt}, #{item.maxFloor}, #{item.dongCnt}, #{item.dorojuso}, #{item.ccCnt} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO APT_INFRA (INFRA_NO, INFRA_NM, CATEGORY_CD, APT_CMPLEX_NO) VALUES (SEQ_APT_INFRA.NEXTVAL, #{infraNm}, #{categoryCd}, #{aptCmplexNo})

INSERT ALL
INTO MGMT_OFFICE( MGMT_OFC_NO, APT_CMPLEX_NO, MGMT_OFC_NM, MGMT_OFC_TELNO, MGMT_OFC_BANK_CD, MGMT_OFC_ACNT_HLDR_NM, MGMT_OFC_ACNT_NO, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{item.mgmtOfcNo}, #{item.aptCmplexNo}, #{item.mgmtOfcNm}, #{item.mgmtOfcTelno}, #{item.mgmtOfcBankCd}, #{item.mgmtOfcAcntHldrNm}, #{item.mgmtOfcAcntNo}, SYSDATE )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL
INTO MEMBER( USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_PW, USER_NM, USER_RRNO, USER_TELNO ) VALUES ( #{item.userNo}, #{item.userId}, #{item.userPw}, #{item.userNm}, #{item.userRrno}, #{item.userTelno} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL
INTO APT_UNIT( DONG_NO, DONG_NM, FLOOR, UNIT_CNT, APT_CMPLEX_NO ) VALUES ( #{item.dongNo}, #{item.dongNm}, #{item.maxFloor}, #{item.unitCnt}, #{item.aptCmplexNo} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL
INTO APT_DETAIL( HO_NO, FLOOR, HO_TY_NO, DONG_NO, HO, HO_STTS_CD ) VALUES ( #{item.hoNo}, #{item.floor}, #{item.hoTyNo}, #{item.dongNo}, #{item.ho}, 'EMPTY' )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL

INSERT ALL
INTO APT_HO_TY( HO_TY_NO, APT_CMPLEX_NO, TY_NM, EXCLUSIVE_SIZE, ROOM_CNT, BATHROOM_CNT ) VALUES ( #{item.hoTyNo}, #{item.aptCmplexNo}, #{item.tyNm}, #{item.exclusiveSize}, #{item.roomCnt}, #{item.bathroomCnt} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT APT_CMPLEX_NO, DOROJUSO FROM APT_COMPLEX WHERE LAT_VAL = 0 OR LON_VAL = 0

SELECT D.HO_NO, D.HO, D.FLOOR, D.HO_TY_NO, U.DONG_NO, U.APT_CMPLEX_NO FROM APT_DETAIL D JOIN APT_UNIT U ON D.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO
WHERE U.APT_CMPLEX_NO IN
#{apt}
AND D.HO_STTS_CD = 'EMPTY'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM RENT_LISTING RL WHERE RL.HO_NO = D.HO_NO )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APT_COMPLEX (APT_CMPLEX_NO, APT_CMPLEX_NM, BJD_CD, SIDO_NM, SIGUNGU_NM, EMD_NM, LAT_VAL, LON_VAL, UNIT_CNT, BLD_YR, CNSCO_NM, HEAT_TY, PKG_CNT, MAX_FLOOR, DONG_CNT, DOROJUSO, CC_CNT) VALUES (#{aptCmplexNo}, #{aptCmplexNm}, #{bjdCd}, #{sidoNm}, #{sigunguNm}, #{emdNm}, #{latVal}, #{lonVal}, #{unitCnt}, #{bldYr}, #{cnscoNm}, #{heatTy}, #{pkgCnt}, #{maxFloor}, #{dongCnt}, #{dorojuso}, #{ccCnt})
INSERT INTO MGMT_OFFICE(MGMT_OFC_NO, APT_CMPLEX_NO, MGMT_OFC_NM, MGMT_OFC_TELNO, REG_DT) VALUES (#{mgmtOfcNo}, #{aptCmplexNo}, #{mgmtOfcNm}, #{mgmtOfcTelno}, SYSDATE)
INSERT INTO MEMBER(USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_PW, USER_NM, USER_RRNO, USER_TELNO) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userNm}, #{userRrno}, #{userTelno})
INSERT INTO MANAGER(USER_NO, MGMT_OFC_NO, MNGR_DUTY_CD) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{mgmtOfcNo}, #{mngrDutyCd})
mapper.select: SELECT APT_CMPLEX_NO , APT_CMPLEX_NM , BJD_CD , SIDO_NM , SIGUNGU_NM , EMD_NM , LAT_VAL , LON_VAL , UNIT_CNT , BLD_YR , CNSCO_NM , IMG_FILE_NO , RPRSNT_IMG_FILE_NO , HEAT_TY , PKG_CNT , MAX_FLOOR , FREE_PKG_CNT , DONG_CNT , DOROJUSO , CC_CNT FROM APT_COMPLEX WHERE APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo}
SELECT DONG_NO , DONG_NM , FLOOR , UNIT_CNT , APT_CMPLEX_NO FROM APT_UNIT WHERE APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(DONG_NM)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MGMT_OFC_BANK_ACNT(OFC_BANK_ACNT_NO, MGMT_OFC_ACNT_NO, MGMT_OFC_ACNT_HLDR_NM, MGMT_OFC_BANK_CD, MGMT_OFC_NO) VALUES (SEQ_OFC_BANK_ACNT.NEXTVAL, #{mgmtOfcAcntNo}, #{mgmtOfcAcntHldrNm}, #{mgmtOfcBankCd}, #{mgmtOfcNo})
INSERT INTO APT_HO_TY (HO_TY_NO, APT_CMPLEX_NO, TY_NM, EXCLUSIVE_SIZE, ROOM_CNT, BATHROOM_CNT) VALUES (#{hoTyNo}, #{aptCmplexNo}, #{tyNm}, #{exclusiveSize}, #{roomCnt}, #{bathroomCnt})
